name: Oatmeal Pumpkin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine oats and milk. Allow to stand about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in pumpkin, eggs, and margarine.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
5. Gradually add dry ingredients to the oatmeal mixture; stir in raisins and nuts until well combined.
6. Pour batter into a 9 x 5-inch loaf pan.
7. Bake for 55 to 60 minutes or until done.
8. Cool on a wire rack.
